attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who prioritizes strategic GC gains and bonus seconds over outright stage wins, showing tactical maturity beyond years in multi-rider breakaways.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in breakaways, team does not commit to defending high GC positions, allowing rider freedom to hunt stages from breaks rather than defensive pacing.
terrain_preference: Breakaway-friendly stages where tactical positioning and bonus seconds can be harvested; less suited to sustained GC defense requiring team support.
vulnerability: Lacks team depth to defend elevated GC positions; accepts losses in maglia rosa rather than attempting futile defense, suggesting weakness in extended high-pressure GC battles.
key_patterns: Prioritizes bonus seconds in breakaways over stage victories when GC opportunities exist (2 observations)
Shifts tactics from GC positioning to stage hunting after losing defended position (2 observations)
Displays tactical maturity in breakaway decision-making despite young age, 23 years old (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Transitioned from unexpected GC contention to stage hunting role as expected, maintaining competitive positioning 1:48 down without defending
